---
title: "Psych RA Notebook 02 — REDCap / Qualtrics Workflow"
author: "Austen Siegler"
output: html_document
---

> Import/clean workflow for survey platforms, including de-identification steps and codebook creation.
>
> **How to run:** Replace the `read_csv` paths with your actual export files; Knit.

```r
# Packages ----
packages <- c("tidyverse", "janitor", "lubridate", "labelled", "skimr")
to_install <- packages[!packages %in% installed.packages()[, "Package"]]
if (length(to_install) > 0) install.packages(to_install)
lapply(packages, library, character.only = TRUE)
```

## 1) Mock imports (replace with your file paths)

```r
# Qualtrics export (CSV) & REDCap export (CSV)
qualtrics_raw <- tibble::tibble(
  StartDate = Sys.time() - runif(50, 0, 86400),
  EndDate   = Sys.time(),
  RecordedDate = Sys.time(),
  QID1 = sample(1:5, 50, TRUE),  # Likert
  QID2 = sample(1:5, 50, TRUE),
  Email = paste0("user", 1:50, "@example.com"), # PII to drop
  IPAddress = paste0("192.168.1.", sample(2:200, 50, TRUE)) # PII to drop
)

redcap_raw <- tibble::tibble(
  record_id = 1:60,
  consent = sample(0:1, 60, TRUE, prob = c(.05,.95)),
  visit_date = as.Date("2025-01-01") + sample(0:200, 60, TRUE),
  pr_1 = sample(0:3, 60, TRUE),
  pr_2 = sample(0:3, 60, TRUE),
  pr_3 = sample(0:3, 60, TRUE),
  dob = as.Date("1990-01-01") + sample(0:12000, 60, TRUE) # PHI to transform
)
```

## 2) De-identification & harmonization

```r
# Drop direct identifiers from Qualtrics
qualtrics <- qualtrics_raw %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  select(-email, -ip_address)

# Derive age from DOB (then drop DOB)
redcap <- redcap_raw %>%
  mutate(age = floor(as.numeric(difftime(Sys.Date(), dob, units = "days"))/365.25)) %>%
  select(-dob)

# Harmonize names and create labeled factors
qualtrics <- qualtrics %>%
  rename(item1 = qid1, item2 = qid2) %>%
  mutate(across(starts_with("item"), ~factor(., levels = 1:5, labels = c("Strongly disagree","Disagree","Neutral","Agree","Strongly agree"))))

# Join mock datasets (example left_join by record_id if present)
# Here, we just bind rows for demonstration
combined <- bind_rows(
  qualtrics %>% mutate(source = "qualtrics"),
  redcap %>% mutate(source = "redcap")
) %>%
  clean_names()
```

## 3) Codebook, missingness, and tidy outputs

```r
# Codebook
skimr::skim(combined)

# Missingness
miss <- combined %>% summarise(across(everything(), ~sum(is.na(.))))
miss

# Save clean outputs
readr::write_csv(combined, "clean_combined.csv")
```

## 4) Simple summary table

```r
combined %>%
  select(source, age, starts_with("item"), pr_1:pr_3, consent) %>%
  group_by(source) %>%
  summarise(across(where(is.numeric), ~mean(., na.rm = TRUE))) %>%
  janitor::adorn_rounding(digits = 2)
```

## 5) Session info

```r
sessionInfo()
```
